name: Syntec Biofuel Inc.
summary: Syntec Biofuel Inc., a renewable energy company, develops and commercializes biofuel technology and processes to convert waste cellulosic biomass into ethanol and other high-value alcohols. It also offers consulting services, including project evaluation, technology assessments, project development and advisory, site selection and evaluation, program management, business development, financial and market analysis, risk management, engineering and construction, and strategy and marketing services. In addition, it offers various biofuels, including ethanol, an alcohol-based fuel; methanol that is used as a fuel and antifreeze, and to make formaldehyde and bio-diesel; butanol, a flammable liquid that is used as a fuel and as an industrial solvent; and propanol, a colorless volatile liquid that is used as a solvent and antiseptic. The company was formerly known as NetCo Investments Inc. and changed its name to Syntec Biofuel Inc. in July 2006. The company was founded in 2000 and is based in Vancouver, Canada.
